chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-886 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 3466/24 2.For orders on office objections,. 3.For orders on CMA 3467/24 4.For hearing of main case. 29-05-2024 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. This petition has been filed by petitioner for recovery of payment on account of supply of wheat by him to the respondents department. Learned counsel holding brief has failed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition, as the petitioner is seeking recovery of his amount in a Constitutional Petition although his remedy lies in filing Civil Suit. No case for indulgence therefore is made out. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
